title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Corgi's founders rebuilt the insurance industry from the ground up by questioning legacy defaults rather than modernizing incumbents. The founders raised $108M in Series A funding and attribute their competitive moat to time, energy, and regulatory complexity accumulated over two years. Their approach emphasizes pursuing the most ambitious version of an idea, with projected hundreds of millions in ARR.
